hi, i'm

Simon Holm

AI Student · Builder · IMADA Fagråd Chair

5th-semester Artificial Intelligence student at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU). I'm interested in machine learning interpretability and Danish & EU technology sovereignty. Outside academia I chair the IMADA Fagråd — the student council for Mathematics & Computer Science — advocating for students across the institute.

Projects CV Contact

Background

About me

I study AI at SDU's IMADA faculty in Odense. My coursework spans algorithms & data structures, machine learning, functional programming, knowledge representation, and optimisation. I write my study notes in Typst — you can play with Typst syntax in a game I built: Typstnique.

As Chairperson of the IMADA Fagråd (since March 2025), I represent AI and Mathematics students in meetings with faculty and university leadership.
